news.headline: Goldman Sachs predicts bleak long-term S&P 500 returns due to high market concentration, forecasting only 3% annually over the next decade - a sharp decline from the past decade's 13%.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs analysts warn U.S. equity investors of significantly lower returns for the S&P 500 in the next decade due to historically high market concentration levels. The current concentration in the U.S. stock market is the highest in a century, potentially impacting long-term index returns. Their forecast predicts a nominal total return of only 3% annually over the next 10 years, with a real return of around 1%. This is much lower than the robust 13% return of the past decade. The high market concentration is cited as a major factor behind this projection.

news.headline: Fresenius Medical Care presents hemodiafiltration therapy at ASN Kidney Week 2024 to improve outcomes in dialysis.
news.summary: An upcoming session will focus on the latest developments in hemodiafiltration therapy, demonstrating its ability to enhance patient outcomes by effectively removing toxins during dialysis. Researchers and clinical experts across the company will present findings from extensive global databases, shedding light on the promising advancements in this treatment method.

news.headline: UniSource Energy Services in Tucson, Arizona may receive up to $75 million from US DOE for new transmission line.
news.summary: A company in Tucson, Arizona called UniSource Energy Services has been selected to potentially receive up to $75 million from the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) for the construction of a new transmission line.

news.headline: MIT Tech Review's EmTech AI conference returns in May 2025, focusing on generative AI for business & society.
news.summary: A renowned conference on AI leadership by MIT Technology Review is set to make a comeback in spring 2025, with a fresh format and a dedicated emphasis on generative AI and its impact on both business and society. The event, located in CAMBRIDGE, Mass., is scheduled to take place in October 21, 2024. MIT Technology Review's flagship conference, known for its focus on cutting-edge AI trends, will continue its legacy of exploring the intersections of artificial intelligence and the corporate world, highlighting key insights for industry leaders.

news.headline: Better Homes and Gardens Real Estate refreshes brand, emphasizing lifestyle expertise. Subsidiary of Anywhere Real Estate Inc. (NYSE: HOUS).
news.summary: Popular home magazine's real estate brand recently introduced their new tagline, "Nobody Knows Homes BetterSM," in Madison, N.J. on October 21, 2024. Better Homes and Gardens Real Estate LLC, under Anywhere Real Estate Inc. (NYSE: HOUS), has assisted numerous buyers in finding their ideal homes.

news.headline: Instacart and Foodsmart partnership boosts member engagement and health outcomes, doubling engagement and achieving 5% weight loss for many.
news.summary: Recent research has shown that the integration of Instacart and Foodsmart telenutrition in a comprehensive program called Foodcare has led to a substantial increase in member engagement by almost 100%. This approach has also resulted in significant enhancements in diabetes management among participants. Moreover, there has been a notable rise in the number of members successfully achieving sustained weight loss of 5%.

news.headline: Spatially Health partners with Janus Healthcare to enhance behavioral health services with Equity Equalizer™ technology.
news.summary: Spatially Health's Equity Equalizer™ cutting-edge technology is set to offer vital support to Janus Health Partners by providing key insights for their behavioral health services. This collaboration was announced in Miami on October 21, 2024. Spatially Health is known for its cloud-based health equity platform which analyzes data to identify patterns and trends. This partnership is expected to greatly benefit Janus Health Partners as they aim to enhance their services for clients.

news.headline: France mandates e-invoicing, Comarch certified as Registered Private Platform. Company based in Kraków will handle the transition.
news.summary: In Krakow, Poland on October 21, 2024, it was reported that as France, along with other European nations, transitions to an entirely electronic invoicing system, Comarch has achieved certification as a Registered Private Platform for e-invoicing in the country. This milestone enables the Krakow-based company to...

news.headline: Brandwatch makes leadership changes in Chicago to drive growth and innovation, welcoming new leaders.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, in Chicago, Brandwatch, a leading company in social media intelligence on a global scale, revealed key leadership updates aimed at fostering ongoing progress and creativity. Channing Ferrer expressed enthusiasm regarding the appointment of new leaders to the Brandwatch team, emphasizing the importance of these changes in propelling the company's growth and forward momentum.

news.headline: Alcon Lighting partners with Beverly Hills PD to enhance store security with proper lighting. Interview held. Los Angeles, Oct. 21, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, a lighting company collaborated with the local police department to provide guidance on effective store lighting to prevent break-ins. This initiative follows the recent signing of significant legislation in California aimed at safeguarding retail businesses. The partnership aims to educate retailers on the importance of proper lighting in enhancing security measures. The effort comes amidst a concerning increase in burglaries, with statistics indicating a rise of X% in break-ins reported over the past year in the region. The collaboration seeks to address this issue by emphasizing the role of lighting in deterring criminal activities and ensuring the safety of businesses. The joint efforts are part of a broader strategy to support retail businesses and enhance security measures in response to growing safety concerns.

news.headline: eMoney Advisor reveals product roadmap for collaborative planning at annual summit with new updates and features.
news.summary: Cutting-edge research has delved into the collaboration and technology uptake in financial planning. eMoney, a pioneer in the field, has rolled out innovative updates and features based on this research. These enhancements aim to facilitate more cooperative planning between advisors and clients. The company's headquarters in Radnor, Pennsylvania, announced the breakthrough on October 21, 2024.

news.headline: Lido Advisors to merge with Pegasus Partners to enhance UHNW services, adding a Midwest RIA managing $3B for 300 families.
news.summary: Los Angeles, Oct. 21, 2024 - Lido Advisors, LLC (Lido), a prominent wealth advisory firm, disclosed a new partnership with a complementary Midwestern Registered Investment Advisor (RIA). The Midwestern RIA manages over $3 billion in regulatory assets under management (RAUM) spanning across 300 families. This collaboration further expands Lido's reach and influence in the industry. As of September 30, 2024, Lido itself boasts a substantial $24 billion in RAUM. Today's announcement marks a significant development in the strategic growth of Lido Advisors.

news.headline: Mission-based lenders are expanding credit access using bank data and tech, benefiting minority businesses.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, it was reported that mission-driven lenders are utilizing electronic bank account data and technology platforms more often to provide credit to entrepreneurs lacking access to funding. A recent working paper from FinRegLab discusses the current methods and potential future developments in this area. The trend showcases a growing interest in leveraging innovative solutions to reach underserved individuals.

news.headline: Frontier Waste Solutions chosen as solid waste and recycling provider for 4 cities - McKinney, Balcones Heights, Fair Oaks Ranch, and Tomball. Operations started on October 1, 2024.
news.summary: Frontier Waste Solutions based in Dallas disclosed on October 21, 2024, that it has been chosen as the sole provider of solid waste and recycling services for McKinney, Balcones Heights, Fair Oaks Ranch, and Tomball. The operations began on October 1, establishing a significant service footprint in these cities.

news.headline: Vacations By Rail® announces top 2025 escorted tours, including two new Northern Lights excursions, due to demand.
news.summary: A prominent expert in rail and river cruises in North America is enlarging its range to incorporate fresh domestic and international winter tours in response to strong demand for the year 2025. Vacations By Rail®, the top provider of train vacations in North America, announced the expansion from its headquarters in Chicago on October 21, 2024.

news.headline: IQAir in Switzerland launches free media air quality dashboard with real-time data from 80,000 locations.
news.summary: Swiss air quality technology company, IQAir, has introduced an editorial dashboard in Goldach, Switzerland on October 21, 2024. This dashboard provides free access to current air quality information for media usage. It sources data from more than 80,000 locations, ensuring real-time updates are readily available. This initiative aims to enhance awareness and accessibility to air quality data for media organizations.

news.headline: Andes announces AndesCore™ 46-Series Family with 4 members, including AX46MPV, a new 64-bit multicore superscalar vector processor. Ideal for network processors, embedded controllers, and AI/ML applications.
news.summary: Recently, Andes Technology, a prominent provider of energy-efficient 32/64-bit RISC-V processor cores and a founding premier member of RISC-V International, unveiled the AndesCore™ 46-series processor family, consisting of 4 models. The flagship model, AX46MPV, introduces a novel 64-bit multicore superscalar vector processor IP, building upon the success of the previous Andes Vector core by incorporating upgrades like dual load/store units, private L2 cache, an extended VLEN, Andes Matrix Multiply Extension, and RVA22 profile support. The second model, AX46MP, shares all features with AX46MPV except for vector and matrix support. The remaining two models, A46MP and A46MPV, are 32-bit versions of AX46MP and AX46MPV, respectively. These advancements position the 46-series processors as an optimal choice for network processors running Linux, high-performance embedded controllers with demanding memory requirements, and extensive AI/ML applications.

news.headline: ASUS launches first Copilot+ PC, ExpertBook P5, in Canada starting at CA$1,299, enhancing productivity and security.
news.summary: Discover cutting-edge AI technology and top-of-the-line security features tailored for today's high achievers. This innovative solution is now accessible in Canada, with prices beginning at CA$1,299.

news.headline: Bespoke Partners report examines executive recruitment trends in private equity for software companies. Focus on compensation and turnover.
news.summary: In San Diego, Bespoke Partners, a prominent retained executive search and leadership advisory firm catering to software companies, has unveiled its latest 2H2024 Talent Market Update Report. The report delves into current executive recruiting trends amid the evolving economic landscape. The newly released Private Equity Talent Report zeroes in on executive recruitment patterns within private equity-backed software and SaaS enterprises. It sheds light on aspects such as executive compensation, equity packages, and turnover rates in these sectors, providing valuable insights for stakeholders.

news.headline: WordLift, Italian SEO startup, partners with Breadcrumbs Inc, U.S. lead scoring company for growth in AI-driven SEO.
news.summary: In Rome, WordLift, a prominent Italian startup excelling in SEO and Generative AI for eCommerce and serving renowned brands like Ray-Ban, Oakley, and Kinsta, has revealed a significant partnership with Breadcrumbs Inc, a US firm known for lead scoring and catering to clients like MailUp and Thinkific. This collaboration is intended to bolster WordLift's standing in the fast-developing AI industry by incorporating Breadcrumbs' Italian team and capitalizing on their global proficiency. Through this agreement, Breadcrumbs's.

news.headline: Demand Chain AI adds Susan Stults and Dave Jones to Board of Directors in Battle Creek, Michigan.
news.summary: In Battle Creek, Michigan, Demand Chain AI recently welcomed Susan Stults and Dave Jones to its Board of Directors. This addition brings the total number of board members to two.

news.headline: SiFive releases HiFive Premier P550 RISC-V board, highest performance in the world. Now shipping.
news.summary: SiFive, based in Santa Clara, California, has recently unveiled the HiFive Premier P550 RISC-V development board. This board is recognized as the most high-performing RISC-V board in the world. It is now available for purchase, showcasing cutting-edge technology and capabilities.

news.headline: Clarify Health and Prealize Health join forces to enhance healthcare predictive analytics, improving resource allocation and reducing costs.
news.summary: A healthcare data and analytics company, Clarify Health, based in San Francisco, and healthcare predictive analytics platform, Prealize Health, located in San Mateo, have joined forces through a strategic partnership. This collaboration aims to revolutionize healthcare forecasting by enabling health systems and health plans to predict patient requirements and utilization patterns. By leveraging this partnership, organizations can strategically allocate resources, minimize superfluous expenses, and enhance overall operational efficiency.

news.headline: Kodansha launches "K MANGA" app in Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and Singapore, featuring 500 titles, including popular series like Attack on Titan. Available on iOS and Android from October 22.
news.summary: Kodansha Ltd., a prominent Japanese publisher known for popular manga like Attack on Titan and Fairy Tail, is introducing its official manga app "K MANGA" in Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and Singapore. The launch is set for October 22nd, with availability on both iOS and Android devices. The app boasts a selection of over 500 English titles, including approximately 100 ongoing series that are synchronized with their Japanese releases. On "K MANGA," users will have access to a wide range of content from Kodansha Ltd., making it a significant new platform for manga enthusiasts in these regions.

news.headline: Company reports $12M profit for first half of 2024.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 10.2%, with over 15 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the stock market has seen a sharp decline, with the main index dropping by 7.5% in just one day. These economic indicators point towards a growing financial crisis that is impacting both jobs and investments nationwide. The government has announced plans to address the situation through stimulus measures and support for affected industries. Experts predict that it will take time for the economy to fully recover from these setbacks.

news.headline: City of Hope to share cancer research at conference; ranked top 5 in US by U.S. News, with new data on integrative oncology.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, researchers from City of Hope®, a prominent cancer research and treatment institution in the U.S., which is recognized as one of the top 5 cancer centers by U.S. News & World Report, and a pioneer in delivering high-quality integrated supportive care for cancer patients, will share fresh insights on integrative oncology research and clinical trials at the 21st International Conference of the Society for Integrative Oncology. The institution is known for its excellence in cancer care and aims to provide cutting-edge treatment opportunities to patients.

Report provides insights on top 20 power generation projects per region, with analysis on total project values and operators.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Project Insight - Global Power Generation Construction Projects (Q2 2024)" has been included in the catalog of ResearchAndMarkets.com. Additionally, the report includes rankings of the primary operators in the sector, highlighting the leading contractors.

news.headline: Qatar construction industry output to shrink by 2.8% in 2024, rebound at 4.7% AAGR from 2025-2028 due to energy project investments.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Qatar Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector - Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional and Residential Market Analysis to 2028 (Q2 2024)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. After experiencing a 5.7% decrease in 2023, the construction sector in Qatar is projected to decline by an additional 2.8% in real terms in 2024. This is attributed to low investor and consumer confidence levels due to high interest rates.

news.headline: Deloitte recognized as a Leader in ISG Provider Lens™ for Workday Ecosystem 2024 in US and Europe for various services.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Deloitte was acknowledged as a top leader in the Information Service Group (ISG) Provider Lens™ report for the Workday Ecosystem 2024 in both the US and Europe. The recognition was for various categories including Transformation Services, Deployment and Integration Services, as well as Performance and Optimization Services. The prestigious acknowledgment highlights Deloitte's excellence in these areas and underscores its significant presence in the industry.

news.headline: EverCommerce (NASDAQ: EVCM) will report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 12, 2024, after US financial markets close.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, EverCommerce Inc. (NASDAQ: EVCM), a prominent SaaS solutions provider for service SMBs, announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, November 12, 2024, after the closure of the U.S. financial markets.

news.headline: Viasat partners with Connectbase to provide satellite connectivity solutions for SMBs in the US. Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: In Boston on October 21, 2024, Viasat, a leading communications company, announced its partnership with Connectbase to offer top-notch satellite business internet services to small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) throughout the United States. This collaboration aims to cater to unserved and underserved areas, providing essential connectivity solutions to a wider range of businesses.

news.headline: Visual Comfort & Co. partners with Waterford to launch new lighting collection, merging luxury expertise.
news.summary: In Houston on October 21, 2024, Visual Comfort & Co. unveiled a new partnership with Waterford, a prestigious luxury crystal brand. This collaboration merges Visual Comfort's skills in crafting upscale designer lighting with Waterford's legacy in exquisite crystal craftsmanship.

news.headline: Gartner survey from Q2 2024: 57% of CIOs leading AI strategy face 4 challenges in delivering value safely at scale.
news.summary: In a recent survey conducted by Gartner, Inc., which included 451 senior technology leaders, it was found that 57% of Chief Information Officers (CIOs) reported being responsible for spearheading an artificial intelligence (AI) strategy within their organizations during the second quarter of 2024. Despite this, CIOs are encountering challenges that hinder their ability to effectively leverage AI for value creation. The rapidly evolving tech landscape with new offerings from various vendors has created a scenario where CIOs find themselves constantly navigating through the hype surrounding AI innovations, while struggling to achieve tangible outcomes and demonstrate the true value of their AI initiatives.

news.headline: Winston & Strawn welcomes New York Tax Partner James Saeli to their Transactions Department, specializing in real estate finance.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Winston & Strawn LLP in New York, it was revealed that James Saeli, commonly known as Jamie, has become a partner in the firm's Transactions Department. He will primarily be working with the Tax Practice. Specializing in the tax elements of real estate finance, with a particular focus on mortgage-backed securitization like real estate investment conduits (REMICs), Jamie offers federal income tax advice to clients. His expertise includes various tax-advantaged real estate investment vehicles. With this new addition, the firm strengthens its team in New York, enhancing its capabilities in this area.

news.headline: Global Surgical N95 Respirators market to reach USD 4,018.3 million by 2030, growing at CAGR of 3.6%.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of October 21, 2024, the Surgical N95 Respirators Market has been analyzed based on type (Flat-fold, Cup Style) and application (Hospital & Clinic, Industrial) for the period of 2024-2030. The global market for Surgical N95 Respirators was valued at a considerable figure.

news.headline: $1.1B deal: Stripe buys stablecoin platform Bridge. One of the largest in crypto history after announcing stablecoin support.
news.summary: One of the largest deals in the history of cryptocurrencies has been struck, coming on the heels of Stripe's recent announcement of support for stablecoins.

news.headline: MPAY buys Web Payroll & Tax Solutions on October 1, 2024, expanding payroll services nationwide. #acquisition #payroll
news.summary: MPAY, a prominent payroll and human capital management solutions provider, has recently expanded its national reach by acquiring Web Payroll & Tax Solutions as of October 1, 2024. This strategic move aims to bolster MPAY's presence in the industry. The acquisition marks a significant step in MPAY's growth strategy, enhancing its offerings and solidifying its position in the market. This development comes as MPAY continues to consolidate its position in the payroll services sector.

news.headline: mPATH Health receives $3M funding for cancer screening initiatives, fueling mission to enhance prevention efforts.
news.summary: mPATH® Health, a digital health firm in Winston-Salem, N.C., shared exciting news by revealing the recent completion of a $3 million funding round on October 21, 2024. This financial boost is expected to fast-track the company's efforts in revolutionizing cancer screening to further its goal of enhancing cancer prevention methods and overall healthcare efficiency.

news.headline: Bank of America offers longest Foreign Exchange Rate Guarantee, up to one year. Shares trading lower premarket.
news.summary: Shares of Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) are seeing a decline in premarket trading as the company announces plans to enhance its foreign exchange (FX) risk management for cross-currency payments and receipts. The bank is now offering Guaranteed FX Rates for up to one year, the longest tenor in the industry. This new solution aims to assist businesses in mitigating risks associated with currency fluctuations and streamlining treasury management processes such as forecasting and reconciliation. Bank of America is celebrating the eighth anniversary of introducing this initiative.

news.headline: Community Heritage Financial, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share, payable on Nov 8, 2024.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, in Middletown, Maryland, Community Heritage Financial, Inc. (OTCPK: CMHF) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.06 per share on its common stock. Shareholders of record as of a specified date will receive the dividend payment on November 8, 2024.

news.headline: Lumen partners with Meta to boost AI with flexible network solutions, LUMN stock up. AI ambitions to benefit with increased network capacity.
news.summary: Stocks of Lumen Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LUMN) experienced an increase in value as the company revealed a collaboration with Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) to boost Meta's network capacity and advance its artificial intelligence goals. This partnership will provide Meta with more adaptable and secure bandwidth, catering to its intricate computational needs and allowing it to cater to billions of users on a daily basis. Ashley Haynes-Gaspar, Lumen’s Executive Vice President and Chief Revenue Officer, expressed the company's readiness to fulfill this growing demand. For more details, the complete news article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cigna and Humana resume merger talks to create industry giant, targeting Medicare Advantage market.
news.summary: Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) is reportedly in discussions to merge with Humana Inc. (NYSE:HUM) in a move that could create a dominant force in the health insurance industry. Talks, previously halted due to pricing disputes, have now resumed with a focus on a game-changing consolidation that could alter market dynamics. A recent Bloomberg report revealed that the merger talks would significantly bolster Cigna's presence in Medicare Advantage and commercial insurance, while also capitalizing on Humana's strong Medicare segment. This potential merger has the industry buzzing about the implications it could have on the sector. Separately, the US Federal Trade Commission has filed a lawsuit against CVS Health, Cigna, and UnitedHealth, adding another layer of complexity to the healthcare landscape. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US banks to cut corporate deposit returns as Fed lowers interest rates, first time in 4 years. Financial sector potentially impacted.
news.summary: U.S. banks are cutting interest payments on corporate deposits following a 50 basis points reduction in the Fed's benchmark rate, the first in over four years. As interest rates soared to 23-year highs in the wake of rapid rate hikes, banks increased interest payments on deposits to retain customers. However, with the recent rate cuts, they are now focusing on reducing costs associated with corporate deposits. Industry executives like Bruce Van Saun from Citizens Financial Group Inc. have mentioned actively pricing down these deposits to maintain profit margins. This shift is essential as banks try to balance decreasing interest levels and attract and retain capital in the face of expected future rate cuts.

news.headline: BISSELL introduces 3 new Little Green models with Pet Proven certification for top cleaning performance. #BISSELL #LittleGreen #PetProven
news.summary: BISSELL, known for its homecare solutions for almost 150 years, has unveiled three new Little Green® models in GRAND RAPIDS, Mich., on Oct. 21, 2024. These models are the first in the industry to be Pet Proven™ certified, guaranteeing top cleaning performance trusted by pet households.

news.headline: AFP President & CEO Jim Kaitz retires after 25 years; new CEO appointed. Rockville, Md., Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: After serving as President & CEO of the Association for Financial Professionals for over 25 years, Jim Kaitz is set to retire. The announcement was made by the AFP in Rockville, Md., on October 21, 2024, signaling an end to Kaitz's successful leadership. Throughout his tenure, he made significant contributions to the organization's growth and development.

news.headline: Silicon photonics market to reach $7.52B by 2029 from $2.16B in 2024, with 28.3% CAGR growth - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ revealed that the worldwide silicon photonics market had a value of USD 2.16 billion in 2024. This market is estimated to skyrocket to USD 7.52 billion by 2029, indicating a significant growth rate of 28.3% over the five-year period. The main driving force behind this surge is...

news.headline: World Table Tennis (WTT) to introduce United States Smash in Las Vegas, expanding sport's footprint in US in 2025.
news.summary: Las Vegas will be the host city for the highly anticipated WTT Grand Smash event, marking a significant milestone in the sport's growing presence in the United States. The event, known as the United States Smash (US Smash), is scheduled for 2025 and promises to bring excitement to Las Vegas. This move signifies WTT's commitment to expanding the sport across the country and highlighting its popularity. The championship is set to attract a large audience and generate substantial interest, showcasing the increasing importance of table tennis in the American sports scene. Don't miss the electrifying action as Las Vegas prepares to host the US Smash in the coming year.

news.headline: SOCi appoints John Gardiner as CFO following $100M ARR milestone, to focus on global expansion and operational excellence.
news.summary: Following SOCi's achievement of reaching $100 million in annual recurring revenue, Gardiner has set his sights on spearheading worldwide growth, improving operational efficiency, and enhancing customer service. The announcement was made by SOCi, Inc., on October 21, 2024, in San Diego. John's appointment is expected to further drive the company towards these goals.

news.headline: OneAmerica Financial launches Asset Care 2024 to cover LTC expenses or leave a financial legacy to loved ones.
news.summary: A financial company based in Indianapolis, announced the introduction of Asset Care® 2024, a new product designed to assist clients in covering long-term care expenses or leaving a financial inheritance for their families. This enhanced product aims to provide support in managing long-term care needs effectively. The launch of Asset Care® 2024 signifies the company's commitment to addressing the growing demand for long-term care solutions. Clients can now benefit from a comprehensive plan to safeguard their financial well-being, ensuring they are prepared for any potential long-term care costs or can leave behind a legacy for their loved ones. This initiative by OneAmerica Financial® demonstrates their dedication to offering tailored financial products to meet the evolving needs of their customers in 2024.
